query:
-- First, let's see what the current "Other" services look like for the 6 customers
SELECT 
  s.serviceExternalId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.discoveryNotes,
  c.name as customerName,
  c.externalId as customerId
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.externalId IN ('C0753', 'C2893', 'C2441', 'C9024', 'C9025', 'C9026', 'C0064', 'C0288', 'C2890')
  AND s.supplier = 'SasBoss'
  AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00
ORDER BY c.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

SELECT 
  s.serviceExternalId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.discoveryNotes,
  c.name as customerName,
  c.externalId as customerId
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.externalId IN ('C0753', 'C2893', 'C2441', 'C9024', 'C9025', 'C9026', 'C0064', 'C0288', 'C2890')
  AND s.supplier = 'SasBoss'
  AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00
ORDER BY c.name;
